title: First Presbyterian Church, Altadena: Oral History Project By Senior Task Force
creator: First Presbyterian Church, Altadena
description: Please visit the California Revealed website to see the most complete and up-to-date version of this object: https://californiarevealed.org/node/575484 .

A collection of 23 oral history interviews recording the personal stories of the Nisei members of First Presbyterian Church, Altadena. Also includes an article on the church's history, written in the late 1980s for the church's 75th anniversary. Interviewees: Rev. Larry Driskill; Elsie Hayashi; Henry Hayashi; Fred Hiraoka; Irene Hirashiki; Jim Ishii; Ruth Ishii; Rev. Nick Iyoya; Rhoda Iyoya; Frank Iwata; Rev. Harriet Johnson; Miki Kumamoto; Jimmie Nishimoto; Miye Nishimoto; Helen Obazawa; Ted Tajima; Frank Tanaka; Ruth Tanaka; Sophie Toriumi; Harry Tsushima; Mae Tsushima; Mack Yamaguchi; Kiyo Yamate.
